caption: Table 130. Document revision history
rows: Updated Table 2: STM32H523xx features and peripheral counts, Table 10: SPI features, Table 20: Maximum allowed clock frequencies, Table 49: Flash memory programming, Table 84: OCTOSPI characteristics in DTR mode (with DQS) / HyperBus, Table 89: 12-bit ADC characteristics, and Table 104: LPTIMx characteristics. Updated Figure 5: LQFP48 pinout and Figure 7: LQFP64 pinout. Updated Wake-up time from low-power modes and High-speed external clock generated from a crystal/ceramic resonator. Minor text edits across the whole document.

Updated: – Section 3.7: Boot modes (The name of application note AN2606 is updated to Introduction to system memory boot mode on STM32 MCUs) – Table 13: STM32H523xx pin/ball definition (M12 pin is added in UFBGA144 column.) – Section 5.3.2: VCAP external capacitor (The name of application note AN5711 is updated to STM32H5 Series hardware development). – Table 29: Typical and maximum current consumption in Run mode, code with data processing running from SRAM with cache 2-way (Values in the f (MHz) column are modified) HCLK – Section 5.3.14: I/O port characteristics (The name of application note AN4899 is updated to STM32 microcontroller GPIO hardware settings and low-power consumption.) Minor text edits throughout the document.
